desc: ClashManagerExportResultsToPdfReportCommand — HTML-as-PDF exporter until a native PDF renderer is wired.
summary: ClashManagerExportResultsToPdfReportCommand — HTML-as-PDF exporter until a native PDF renderer is wired.
notfor: Actual PDF binary — blocked until Chromium headless lands; structure unchanged when it does.
postcondition: Single file on disk with .pdf extension but HTML payload.
logictree: 1) Read clash XML. 2) Resolve output path (default .mepbridge/qa/reports/clashes_{ts}.pdf). 3) Write HTML payload via BuildSelfContainedClashReportHtml. 4) Open in browser on Human. 5) Emit result with mode=html_as_pdf flag so callers know the artifact format.
